title: CFB — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Campaign Finance Board (CFB) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the CFB Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us, agency 'Campaign Finance Board (CFB)'), the Follow the Money search API (nyccfb.info/FTMSearchWebAPI), the bulk Data Library CSVs, and the C-SMART disclosure application. Includes the money spine, the election/office spine, the NYC borough spine, and postal address.

Borough.description: Borough name. CFB raw data uses numeric BOROUGHCD / OFFICEBORO codes (1 Manhattan, 2 Bronx, 3 Brooklyn, 4 Queens, 5 Staten Island); normalized to name here.

Money.description: A monetary amount in US dollars (CFB 'AMNT', 'MATCHAMNT', 'PRIMARYPAY', 'TOTALPAY', etc.). CFB reports campaign finance figures in USD.

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point. CFB address data is text-only (no lat/long is published); provided for spine consistency and optional geocoding.

Address.description: A postal address as carried by CFB contribution/expenditure/intermediary records (STRNO, STRNAME, APARTMENT, CITY, STATE, ZIP).

ElectionCycle.description: Election cycle year ('ELECTION' / 'el_cycle'), e.g. 2021, 2025, 2029. CFB organizes all filings by four-year citywide cycle plus off-year/special elections.

Office.description: The elected office sought — reconciles CFB 'OFFICECD', 'OFFICEDIST'/'boro_dist', 'OFFICEBORO'.

code.description: Office code ('OFFICECD') — Mayor, Public Advocate, Comptroller, Borough President, City Council.

district.description: District number for City Council seats ('OFFICEDIST' / 'boro_dist').

CandidateReference.description: A reference to a candidate by CFB identifiers.

class.description: Candidate class ('CANCLASS' / 'cand_class_cd') — participating / non-participating / limited participation.

CommitteeReference.description: A reference to an authorized campaign committee (the filer).
